mapper.sql: slot_id AS "slotId", resolution_id AS "resolutionId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", template_version_id AS "templateVersionId", template_key AS "templateKey", template_version AS "templateVersion", template_digest AS "templateDigest", requirement_code AS "requirementCode", occurrence_key AS "occurrenceKey", requirement_name AS "requirementName", media_type AS "mediaType", required_flag AS "required", min_count AS "minCount", max_count AS "maxCount", condition_input_digest AS "conditionInputDigest", resolution_explanation::text AS "explanation", requirement_definition::text AS "definition", requirement_digest AS "requirementDigest", status_projection AS "status", resolved_at AS "resolvedAt"

evidence_revision_id AS "evidenceRevisionId", evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", slot_id AS "slotId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", revision_number AS "revisionNumber", file_object_id AS "fileObjectId", content_digest AS "contentDigest", mime_type AS "mimeType", size_bytes AS "sizeBytes", capture_metadata::text AS "captureMetadata", status AS "status", source_upload_session_id AS "sourceUploadSessionId", finalize_command_id AS "finalizeCommandId", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM evd_evidence_slot WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) AND slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid)
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_slot WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid) FOR UPDATE
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO evd_evidence_upload_session ( upload_session_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, slot_id, file_id, evidence_item_id, expected_sha256, declared_mime_type, expected_size_bytes, original_file_name, capture_metadata, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{uploadSessionId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), CAST(#{fileId} AS uuid),
CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid) NULL , #{expectedSha256}, #{declaredMimeType}, #{expectedSizeBytes}, #{originalFileName}, CAST(#{captureMetadata} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT upload_session_id AS "uploadSessionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", slot_id AS "slotId", file_id AS "fileId", evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", expected_sha256 AS "expectedSha256", declared_mime_type AS "declaredMimeType", expected_size_bytes AS "expectedSizeBytes", original_file_name AS "originalFileName", capture_metadata::text AS "captureMetadata", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM evd_evidence_upload_session WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND upload_session_id = CAST(#{uploadSessionId} AS uuid)

SELECT upload_session_id AS "uploadSessionId", tenant_id AS "tenantId", project_id AS "projectId", task_id AS "taskId", slot_id AS "slotId", file_id AS "fileId", evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", expected_sha256 AS "expectedSha256", declared_mime_type AS "declaredMimeType", expected_size_bytes AS "expectedSizeBytes", original_file_name AS "originalFileName", capture_metadata::text AS "captureMetadata", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM evd_evidence_upload_session WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND file_id = CAST(#{fileId} AS uuid)
mapper.update: UPDATE evd_evidence_upload_session SET status = 'FINALIZED' WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND upload_session_id = CAST(#{uploadSessionId} AS uuid) AND status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: SELECT evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", slot_id AS "slotId", item_ordinal AS "itemOrdinal", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM evd_evidence_item WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_item_id = CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid)

SELECT evidence_item_id AS "evidenceItemId", task_id AS "taskId", project_id AS "projectId", slot_id AS "slotId", item_ordinal AS "itemOrdinal", status AS "status", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM evd_evidence_item WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY slot_id, item_ordinal
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY evidence_item_id, revision_number
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_item_id = CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid) ORDER BY revision_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_command_result ( tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key, result_id) VALUES (#{tenantId}, #{operationType}, #{idempotencyKey}, CAST(#{resultId} AS uuid)) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, operation_type, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(item_ordinal), 0) FROM evd_evidence_item WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid)
SELECT count(*) FROM evd_evidence_item WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid)

SELECT count(*) FROM evd_evidence_item i WHERE i.tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND i.slot_id = CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM evd_evidence_revision r WHERE r.tenant_id = i.tenant_id AND r.evidence_item_id = i.evidence_item_id AND r.status IN ('STORED', 'VALIDATING', 'VALIDATED') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_item ( evidence_item_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, slot_id, item_ordinal, status, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), #{itemOrdinal}, #{status}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(revision_number), 0) FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_item_id = CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_revision ( evidence_revision_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, slot_id, evidence_item_id, revision_number, file_object_id, content_digest, mime_type, size_bytes, capture_metadata, status, source_upload_session_id, finalize_command_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{evidenceRevisionId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid), #{revisionNumber}, CAST(#{fileObjectId} AS uuid), #{contentDigest}, #{mimeType}, #{sizeBytes}, CAST(#{captureMetadata} AS jsonb), #{status}, CAST(#{sourceUploadSessionId} AS uuid), #{finalizeCommandId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_revision_id = CAST(#{revisionId} AS uuid)
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND file_object_id = CAST(#{fileObjectId} AS uuid)
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND source_upload_session_id = CAST(#{uploadSessionId} AS uuid)

SELECT count(*) FROM evd_evidence_revision WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND project_id = CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid) AND content_digest = #{contentDigest} AND evidence_revision_id <> CAST(#{excludeRevisionId} AS uuid) AND status IN ('STORED', 'VALIDATING', 'VALIDATED')
mapper.sql: validation_id AS "validationId", evidence_revision_id AS "evidenceRevisionId", check_type AS "checkType", severity AS "severity", result AS "result", reason_code AS "reasonCode", message AS "message", details::text AS "details", validator_name AS "validatorName", validator_version AS "validatorVersion", created_at AS "createdAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM evd_evidence_validation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_revision_id = CAST(#{revisionId} AS uuid) ORDER BY created_at, check_type
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_validation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND task_id = CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid) ORDER BY evidence_revision_id, created_at, check_type
SELECT FROM evd_evidence_validation WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND evidence_item_id = CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid) ORDER BY evidence_revision_id, created_at, check_type
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evd_evidence_validation ( validation_id, tenant_id, project_id, task_id, slot_id, evidence_item_id, evidence_revision_id, check_type, severity, result, reason_code, message, details, validator_name, validator_version, created_at) VALUES ( CAST(#{validationId} AS uuid), #{tenantId}, CAST(#{projectId} AS uuid), CAST(#{taskId} AS uuid), CAST(#{slotId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceItemId} AS uuid), CAST(#{evidenceRevisionId} AS uuid), #{checkType}, #{severity}, #{result}, #{reasonCode}, #{message}, CAST(#{details} AS jsonb), #{validatorName}, #{validatorVersion}, #{createdAt}) ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, evidence_revision_id, check_type) DO NOTHING
